Congratulations, Xavier!

Are you ready for it? 🪩💘🎤

We are giving away TWO tickets to see Taylor Swift at SoFi Stadium on 8/7. We’ll also include round-trip airfare, a two-night hotel stay, and $500 in spending money.  

HOW TO ENTER:  
1) Go to the link in our bio and submit the form.
2) Opportunities for bonus entries are given through additional steps. 
3) That’s it! You’ll be entered to win! 

Enter by 7/20/23 at 11:59 pm MST. Click on the link in our bio to read the official rules.⁠
